other_observers: Denver Audubon Master Birder Class led my Mary Henson;
specific_location: At the southern end of Cherry Creek Reservoir, east of the Cottonwood Creek delta about 400 m.
description: Yellowish-brown gular pouch NOT extending up towards, or around, the eye. Base of gular pouch has a white, side-ways "v-shaped" border. The bird had a long tail, longer than the attendant DCCOs around it, and it was smaller than the DCCOs in the area.Behaviors: Perched on a stump in Cherry Creek reservoir.Call: nonePlumage: adult nonbreeding
